rationale: Review 1's approve is correct: Deck p and the fiber lemmas are at exactly the right generality (for any p, using fibers over points b) matching the docstring and deck-transformation purpose, with no over-specialization. Review 2's requested Set B generalization is a real but non-material/contested API preference whose 'fix' would add needless indirection with no maintainer benefit, so acting on it produces a worse (or equal) PR.
